full_description: Search for {A}; if it is not visible, open {B} with the left hand and pick {A} up with the right hand.
schema: {A} denotes the target object, {B} denotes the cabinet
preference: num of words should not exceed 24. Mention searching first, using the left hand to open the cabinet, and using the right hand to pick the object up.
